segments.text: This AI tool just made motion design agencies obsolete. [music] Hicksfield launched Vibe Motion, an AI platform that generates professional motion
graphics from [music] a single text prompt. You type animated logo that pulses with energy or infographics showing user growth skyrocketing and it
builds it in minutes. But here's what makes this different from other AI video tools. Vibe Motion powered by Clawude AI understands the structure of your
request. It configures the animation logic, the text, brand [music] elements,
movement with technical accuracy. The output is a controllable asset, not a flat video file. Will [music] this replace motion design agencies?
